name: Fudge Filled Nutty Oatmeal Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Beat together butter and brown sugar until creamy.
3. Add eggs, vanilla, and instant coffee; beat well.
4. Stir together oats, flour, baking soda, salt, and 1 cup walnuts. Gradually add oat mixture to butter mixture, beating until blended (batter will be stiff).
5. Remove 2 cups of the dough and set aside.
6. Press remaining dough into bottom of 15 1/2 by 10 1/2 inch jelly roll pan.
7. For filling: Melt butter in a medium saucepan over low heat. Add chocolate; cook, stirring until smooth. Stir in sugar and sweetened condensed milk; continue cooking, stirring constantly, until mixture thickens and sugar is dissolved. Remove from heat; stir in vanilla.
8. Spread chocolate filling over crust in jelly roll pan.
9. Sprinkle reserved dough over filling. Sprinkle remaining 1/2 cup walnuts over all.
10. Bake for 25 minutes or until top is golden brown.
11. Cool completely in pan on wire rack. Serve cut into bars.
